Package com.dassault_systemes.catjsystem.catjsyenv


class CATEnvironment

Class Hierarchy 

java.lang.Object
  |
  +-com.dassault_systemes.catjsystem.catjsyenv.CATEnvironment

Class Location


Framework : CATJSystem

Module : CATJSystem

Class Description

public class CATEnvironment
This object describes the environment of a web application.

It is required in order to instantiate CATSetting objects.

The CATEnvironment instance can be retrieved using the following static method: CATSession.getEnv().
